name: game-cartesiano
description: Mars Rover Math - juego educativo de plano cartesiano

scripts.test: tsx --test tests/application/simulateScenario.test.ts tests/domain/rover.test.ts tests/ui/statePanel.test.ts tests/server/ranking.test.ts tests/server/room-engine.test.ts tests/server/scoring.test.ts tests/server/ws-gateway.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: tsx --test --watch tests/application/simulateScenario.test.ts tests/domain/rover.test.ts tests/ui/statePanel.test.ts tests/server/ranking.test.ts tests/server/room-engine.test.ts tests/server/scoring.test.ts tests/server/ws-gateway.test.ts
